  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    toCurrentDate()
    Comodity method that returns the current date and time like the CURRENT-DATE registry (yyyyMMddHHmmssSS)
    String
    toDate()
    Comodity method that returns the current date like the system DATE registry (yyMMdd)
    String
    toDateLong()
    Comodity method that returns the current date like the system DATE YYYYMMDD registry (yyyyMMdd)
    String
    toDay()
    Comodity method that returns the current date like the system DAY registry (yyddd)
    String
    toDayLong()
    Comodity method that returns the current date like the system DAY YYYYDDD registry (yyyyddd)
    String
    toDayOfWeek()
    Comodity method that returns the current day of week
    String
    toString(String format)
     
    String
    toTime()
    Comodity method that returns the current date like the system TIME registry (HHmmssSS)

      public String toDate()
      Comodity method that returns the current date like the system DATE registry (yyMMdd)

      the current date and time like the system DATE registry

      Comodity method that returns the current date like the system DATE YYYYMMDD registry (yyyyMMdd)
